name: swift-demo
description: Full Swift storefront demo on the split composition (Swift 2.4): framework-only base + the surface-swift content surface (both areas + UrlPath + own item types) + five feature layers (feature-reordering + feature-pricing — the P3 split of the retired feature-reordering-pricing — plus feature-rma, feature-subscription-orders, feature-bom-configurator) + sample data, proven on the default theme. Proven on DW 10.28.1-PreRelease.
